texto: You are like the kid who even cannot understand the different between a kiss on the cheek and a kiss on the lips
autor: simple and devoted unlike the rest of the world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a simple and devoted unlike the rest of the world.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “You are like the kid who even cannot understand the different between a kiss on the cheek and a k…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, m-f-moonzajer, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love e hatred-and-madness.
